# SRC033 - Google Ads API: Creating Responsive Search Ads

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | Platform APIs |
| Authors / source | Google |
| Year | Current |
| Source type | Official API docs |
| Quality | High |
| URL | [https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/docs/responsive-search-ads/create-responsive-search-ads](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/docs/responsive-search-ads/create-responsive-search-ads) |

## Bias / limitation

Official platform docs.

## Core takeaway

Responsive search ads require headlines, descriptions, and final URL; ad creation uses AdGroupAdService.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use to define search-ad Markdown output contracts.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.
